Open Data File
Click below to allow access to your data file.
Required once per browser session.
💾
Set up your data file
This app shares a data file with the IFHP module.

If you already set up a data file for the IFHP module, click "Open existing" and select the same OM_Billing_Data.json file — all your providers, fees and ledger will be available immediately.
💡 Use the same OM_Billing_Data.json as the IFHP module to share providers, fees and bookkeeping.

RAMQ Out-of-Province · Form 4292
Practice Information
Pre-fills the provider section of every QC claim form. Shared with the IFHP module.
📍 Clinic Details
🧾 Invoice Numbering
Preview: —
Format: PREFIX-0001 · stored in your data file.
🏥 Hospital
Next invoice number: —
⚠ Admin — Reset QC
Removes QC invoices only from the shared ledger and resets the QC invoice counter.
IFHP invoices and lookup tables are not affected.
Doctor Registry
Shared with IFHP module. CPSO # is required for Quebec forms.
⚠ Make sure CPSO # is filled for all providers used in QC claims.
📥 Bulk import — includes CPSO column
MOH Billing #Doctor Name SpecialtyCPSO #
QC Diagnoses
OHIP 3-digit code → description text for the RAMQ form (not ICD-10).
📥 Bulk import OHIP → description
OHIP CodeDescription
Fee Schedule
Shared with IFHP module. Fee × Units = tarif on each service row.
📥 Bulk import fees
Service CodeFee (CAD $)Description
Premium Add-On Codes
Shared with IFHP module. Premium codes apply to base visit on same date.
Premium Code% of Base Fee Applies to (comma-sep or "all")
Service Locations
Maps service codes to their location type. Default: Hospital Out-Patient.
Codes not listed default to Hospital Out-Patient (externe).
📥 Bulk import location overrides
Service CodeLocation Type
Upload Patient Export
Quebec patient export — includes address and phone columns.
